headline: Place Your Bets – Futures Traders Are About To See The Launch Of AI Semiconductor Contracts
summary: CME Group (NYSE:CME) and data provider Silicon Data are partnering on a brand new market, allowing traders to place bets and hedge their investment risk on GPU price indexes. Futures traders will have access to contracts on a "compute futures...
